description_long: This is a male adult figure with a medium build, dressed in a short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut jeans. The figure has a distinctive hairstyle with medium-length, textured hair styled in loose, thick locks. He is wearing sturdy shoes and has a long firearm slung diagonally across his back, held by a strap over one shoulder. The arms are extended outward, and the hands are relaxed, with fingers slightly apart. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style, and the figure is equipped for carrying an object on his back. The facial features are defined, and the posture is upright and alert.
description: A casually dressed adult male with textured medium-length hair, wearing a t-shirt and jeans, and carrying a long firearm slung across his back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, t-shirt, jeans, and the firearm strap crossing the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the firearm's position on the back, and the relaxed arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the firearm slung across the back and the back of the jeans and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, firearm placement, and the side of the shoes and arm.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
